name: Walford Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Place celery, halved grapes, diced apple, dates, and walnuts in a bowl.
2. In a separate container, whisk together the mayonnaise and dry white wine until well combined.
3. Pour the dressing over the salad ingredients.
4. Gently stir to ensure everything is evenly coated with the dressing.
5. Use a slotted serving spoon to serve the salad, gently shaking the spoon to remove any excess dressing.
